title: Thicket
description: Expanded forestry and woodworking in Minecraft with new trees and relevant mechanics.
body:
![Banner depicting a peaceful forest stream with the title of the mod "Thicket" in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9705b18f6304bf42b0711d31d9b86e3b6ffba162.png)

Thicket aims to expand the woodlands of minecraft with custom trees; each update adding not only a new woodset, but a variety of additional blocks, items, and features that complement the tree's cultural and ecological role in real life.

Additionally, each update will include new uses for vanilla trees, as well as built-in compatibility with other mods.

### V2.0 : Frankincense and Myrrh
- Boswellia; resin-producing tree and accompanying blocks (complete feature list in the version notes)
- Myrrh; resin-producing tree and accompanying blocks (complete feature list in the version notes)
- Heliotrope; vibrant purple flowers

### V1.0 : Hazel
- Hazel; the Celtic tree of wisdom
- Mistletoe; the sacred druid symbol
- Cruxwood; enchanted tools from the esoteric past
- Wood Carving; right click a stripped log with a pocket knife to convert it to its carved variant
- and much more (complete feature list in the version notes)
